{{Quote|My mother was a captain in the Grand Army of the Republic. She died in the battle of T'olan, in the Wuun system…|Trever Flume|<ref name="Last" />}}
'''T'olan''' was an astronomical object in the [[Wuun system]]. Early in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], a terrible [[Battle of T'olan|battle]] was fought at T'olan.

{{Planet-stub}}
